name: Potato Gratin
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a pan.
2. Add onions and sauté until translucent.
3. In a shallow baking dish, arrange layers of potatoes and onions.
4. Between each layer, sprinkle with salt, pepper, nutmeg, and dried thyme leaves.
5. Pour whipping cream over the top of the gratin.
6. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes.
7. Increase temperature to 400°F and bake for an additional 10-20 minutes, or until golden brown and bubbly.
